# The tau-amyloid synergy adds DAM cells rather than advancing them {#sec-trajectory}

```{r}
#| label: trajectory-setup
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
})
options(warn = 2)                                    # promote any chunk warning to a render error (gate-critical)
targets::tar_source()                                # constants, plot theme + genotype scales
targets::tar_load(c(trajectory_report, trajectory_figures)) # compact targets only (no 612MB Seurat)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
theme_set(theme_tau())

trd   <- trajectory_report
trf   <- trajectory_figures
cf    <- trd$cell_frame
on    <- cf[cf$on_lineage, , drop = FALSE]            # on-lineage cells (finite pseudotime)
inter <- trd$interaction
prov  <- trd$provenance
glmm  <- trd$glmm

fmt_p  <- function(p) formatC(p, format = "e", digits = 2)
irow   <- function(m) inter[match(m, inter$measure), ]            # one interaction row by measure
mp_ctr <- function(cn) { r <- trd$weighted_top[[cn]]; r[r$measure == "mean_pt", ] }
ctr_levels <- c("tau_alone", "nlgf_in_maptki", "nlgf_in_p301s", "tau_in_nlgf", "interaction")
ctr_labels <- c(
  tau_alone = "tau alone",
  nlgf_in_maptki = "amyloid on MAPTKI",
  nlgf_in_p301s = "amyloid on P301S",
  tau_in_nlgf = "tau in NLGF",
  interaction = "tau x amyloid"
)
fmt_contrast <- function(x, rev = FALSE) {
  lv <- if (rev) rev(ctr_levels) else ctr_levels
  factor(x, levels = lv, labels = unname(ctr_labels[lv]))
}
# ALL headline numbers inline-computed from the loaded target -> they track the actual cached build
# (R4.6 re-baseline; the per-channel p-values and loadings are drift-prone), never hardcoded.
int_mpt  <- irow("mean_pt")                          # interaction on mean position
int_comp <- irow("comp_cf")                          # composition channel
int_prog <- irow("progression_cf")                   # progression channel (the distinct question)
int_wh   <- irow("within_homeostatic")               # within-homeostatic mean position (composition-robust)
amy_k    <- mp_ctr("nlgf_in_maptki")                 # amyloid main effect, tau-knockout background
amy_p    <- mp_ctr("nlgf_in_p301s")                  # amyloid main effect, mutant-tau background
load_comp  <- prov$composition_loading
load_prog  <- prov$progression_loading
load_cross <- prov$cross_loading
dims_min   <- min(trd$sensitivity$spearman_vs_primary)           # weakest dims/all-retained robustness
omit_pct   <- round(100 * prov$omitted_frac_overall, 1)

# per-cell glmmTMB sentence, computed so the prose adapts if the supportive arm degrades on a build.
glmm_scale <- if (identical(glmm$method, "glmmTMB_beta")) "logit" else "rank-normal"
glmm_sentence <- if (identical(glmm$method, "failed"))
  sprintf("did not yield a usable fit on this build (%s), so the summary-level decomposition stands alone",
          glmm$fail_reason) else
  sprintf("places the interaction at %+.3f on the %s scale (95%% CI [%.3f, %.3f], p %s)",
          glmm$estimate, glmm_scale, glmm$ci_l, glmm$ci_r, fmt_p(glmm$p_value))
# provenance line for the per-cell arm, branched like the sentence: a failed fit carries NA re_sd /
# singular (extractor allows it on the failed branch), so print fail_reason there, never "NA".
glmm_prov <- if (identical(glmm$method, "failed"))
  sprintf("Per-cell sensitivity: %s on %s nuclei / %d units (%s).",
          glmm$method, format(glmm$n_cells, big.mark = ","), glmm$n_units, glmm$fail_reason) else
  sprintf("Per-cell sensitivity: %s on %s nuclei / %d units (random-effect SD %.3f, singular = %s).",
          glmm$method, format(glmm$n_cells, big.mark = ","), glmm$n_units, glmm$re_sd, glmm$singular)

# per-genotype lineage-conditioning audit (omitted IFN/proliferative fraction).
lpu  <- trd$lineage_per_unit
cond <- aggregate(cbind(n_cells, n_on_lineage) ~ genotype, data = lpu, FUN = sum)
cond$genotype <- factor(cond$genotype, levels = genotype_levels)
cond <- cond[order(cond$genotype), ]
cond$`omitted %` <- round(100 * (1 - cond$n_on_lineage / cond$n_cells), 1)

tr_pt <- trf$pt_density
tr_pt$genotype <- factor(as.character(tr_pt$genotype), levels = genotype_levels)
tr_pt$substate <- factor(as.character(tr_pt$substate),
                         levels = intersect(microglia_substate_levels, as.character(unique(tr_pt$substate))))
tr_unit <- trf$unit_pt_vs_dam
tr_unit$genotype <- factor(as.character(tr_unit$genotype), levels = genotype_levels)
tr_unit$batch <- factor(as.character(tr_unit$batch), levels = sort(unique(tr_unit$batch), method = "radix"))
tr_unit$dam_pct <- 100 * tr_unit$dam_fraction
tr_forest <- trf$kitagawa_forest
tr_forest$contrast_label <- fmt_contrast(tr_forest$contrast, rev = TRUE)
tr_forest$measure_label <- c(mean_pt = "mean position",
                             within_homeostatic = "within-homeostatic",
                             within_dam = "within-DAM")[tr_forest$measure]
tr_forest$measure_label <- factor(tr_forest$measure_label,
                                  levels = rev(c("mean position", "within-homeostatic", "within-DAM")))
tr_sens <- trf$trajectory_audit$sensitivity
tr_sens$variant_label <- c(dims_10 = "10 dims", dims_20 = "20 dims",
                           all_retained = "all retained")[tr_sens$variant]
tr_sens$variant_label[is.na(tr_sens$variant_label)] <- tr_sens$variant[is.na(tr_sens$variant_label)]
tr_sens$variant_label <- factor(tr_sens$variant_label,
                                levels = c("10 dims", "20 dims", "all retained"))
tr_lineage <- trf$trajectory_audit$lineage_per_unit
tr_lineage$genotype <- factor(as.character(tr_lineage$genotype), levels = genotype_levels)
tr_lineage$omitted_pct <- 100 * tr_lineage$omitted_frac
```

## Amyloid drives a large shift along the activation axis

```{r}
#| label: fig-trajectory-pseudotime-shift
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 4.5
#| fig-cap: "Amyloid dominates pseudotime position; the interaction is smaller."
#| fig-alt: "Violin and forest panels show amyloid pseudotime shifts and the smaller interaction."
p_dist <- ggplot(on, aes(genotype, pt_raw, fill = genotype)) +
  geom_violin(scale = "width", colour = "grey30", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = prov$dam_onset, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50") +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", colour = "white", size = 1.6) +
  scale_fill_genotype(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "activation pseudotime", title = "Pseudotime by genotype") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))

ctr_levels <- c("tau_alone", "nlgf_in_maptki", "nlgf_in_p301s", "tau_in_nlgf", "interaction")
ov <- do.call(rbind, lapply(ctr_levels, function(cn) {
  r <- mp_ctr(cn)
  data.frame(contrast = cn, coef = r$coef, ci_l = r$ci_l, ci_r = r$ci_r)
}))
ov$contrast <- factor(ov$contrast, levels = rev(ctr_levels))
ov$is_int   <- ov$contrast == "interaction"
p_ctr <- ggplot(ov, aes(coef, contrast, colour = is_int)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "grey70") +
  geom_pointrange(aes(xmin = ci_l, xmax = ci_r)) +
  scale_colour_tau_binary(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "effect on mean pseudotime", y = NULL,
       title = "Genotype effects on position")

(p_dist | p_ctr) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-trajectory-pt-density
#| fig-width: 9.6
#| fig-height: 5.6
#| fig-cap: "High-pseudotime density is concentrated in DAM states."
#| fig-alt: "Faceted area plots show high pseudotime concentrated in DAM states."
ggplot(tr_pt, aes(x_mid, n, fill = substate)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.78, colour = "white", linewidth = 0.15) +
  facet_grid(substate ~ genotype, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_substate(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "activation pseudotime", y = "nuclei per bin",
       title = "Pseudotime density by genotype and substate") +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))
```

## The interaction is composition, not progression

```{r}
#| label: fig-trajectory-decomposition
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 4.5
#| fig-cap: "The position interaction is carried by composition, not progression."
#| fig-alt: "Forest and loading panels decompose the interaction into composition, progression and cross channels."
chan       <- c("mean_pt", "comp_cf", "progression_cf", "cross", "within_homeostatic", "within_dam")
chan_label <- c("mean position", "composition", "progression", "cross",
                "within-homeostatic", "within-DAM")
fd <- inter[match(chan, inter$measure), ]
fd$label <- factor(chan_label, levels = rev(chan_label))
fd$sig   <- fd$ci_l > 0 | fd$ci_r < 0                            # 95% CI excludes zero
p_forest <- ggplot(fd, aes(coef, label, colour = sig)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "grey70") +
  geom_pointrange(aes(xmin = ci_l, xmax = ci_r)) +
  scale_colour_tau_binary(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "interaction effect (pseudotime units)", y = NULL, title = "Interaction by channel")

ld <- data.frame(
  channel = factor(c("composition", "progression", "cross"),
                   levels = c("composition", "progression", "cross")),
  loading = c(load_comp, load_prog, load_cross))
p_load <- ggplot(ld, aes(channel, loading, fill = channel)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.64, colour = "#F8F6F1", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "grey50") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(composition = "#315E6F", progression = "#7A4052", cross = "#8A8A84"),
                    guide = "none") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "loading (fraction of position interaction)",
       title = "Decomposition loadings")

(p_forest | p_load) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-trajectory-unit-pt-dam
#| fig-width: 7.8
#| fig-height: 5.2
#| fig-cap: "Replicate mean position tracks DAM fraction."
#| fig-alt: "Scatter plot shows replicate mean pseudotime increasing with DAM fraction."
ggplot(tr_unit, aes(dam_pct, mean_pt, colour = genotype)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = batch), size = 2.1, alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", formula = y ~ x, se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.55) +
  scale_colour_genotype(name = "genotype") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(round(x), "%")) +
  labs(x = "DAM fraction in unit", y = "mean pseudotime",
       title = "Unit position is coupled to DAM composition") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-trajectory-kitagawa-forest
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 5.6
#| fig-cap: "Channel audit: amyloid shifts position; interaction within-state rows do not clear zero."
#| fig-alt: "Forests show contrast effects and interaction channel estimates with zero reference lines."
decomp_rows <- inter[match(c("comp_cf", "progression_cf", "cross"), inter$measure), , drop = FALSE]
decomp_rows$channel <- factor(c("composition", "progression", "cross"),
                              levels = rev(c("composition", "progression", "cross")))
decomp_rows$sig <- decomp_rows$ci_l > 0 | decomp_rows$ci_r < 0

p_all_channels <- ggplot(tr_forest, aes(coef, contrast_label, colour = significant)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "grey75") +
  geom_pointrange(aes(xmin = ci_l, xmax = ci_r), linewidth = 0.35) +
  facet_wrap(~ measure_label, nrow = 1) +
  scale_colour_tau_binary(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "effect on pseudotime position", y = NULL, title = "Overall and within-state rows")

p_decomp <- ggplot(decomp_rows, aes(coef, channel, colour = sig)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, colour = "grey75") +
  geom_pointrange(aes(xmin = ci_l, xmax = ci_r), linewidth = 0.45) +
  scale_colour_tau_binary(guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "interaction effect", y = NULL, title = "Interaction decomposition")

p_all_channels | p_decomp
```

## Reconciliation, robustness and concordance

```{r}
#| label: fig-trajectory-concordance
#| fig-width: 6.5
#| fig-height: 4.5
#| fig-cap: "Slingshot pseudotime and marker score-axis are concordant."
#| fig-alt: "Binned scatter shows positive concordance between slingshot pseudotime and marker score-axis."
ggplot(on, aes(pt_raw, score_axis_pt)) +
  geom_bin2d(bins = 60) +
  scale_fill_rwb(name = "nuclei", transform = "log10") +
  labs(x = "activation pseudotime", y = "marker score-axis (DAM - homeostatic)",
       title = sprintf("Pseudotime vs marker score-axis (rho = %.2f)", prov$concordance_rho))
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-trajectory-audit
#| fig-width: 9.6
#| fig-height: 4.2
#| fig-cap: "Refits are stable and lineage omission is low across genotypes."
#| fig-alt: "Bar and point panels show stable refits and low lineage omission by genotype."
p_sens <- ggplot(tr_sens, aes(variant_label, spearman_vs_primary)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, colour = "grey70", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin = 0.95, ymax = spearman_vs_primary), linewidth = 0.5, colour = "#315E6F") +
  geom_point(size = 2.2, colour = "#315E6F") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.95, 1.01)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Spearman vs primary", title = "Pseudotime refit concordance") +
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank())

p_omit <- ggplot(tr_lineage, aes(genotype, omitted_pct, colour = genotype, group = genotype_batch)) +
  geom_point(size = 1.9, alpha = 0.85, position = position_dodge(width = 0.45)) +
  scale_colour_genotype(guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(round(x, 1), "%")) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "off-lineage nuclei", title = "Omitted fraction by unit") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1))

p_sens | p_omit
```
